summary: Repair the exact-head hosted M4 context-toggle failure and make the noninteractive macOS lifecycle probe explicitly accept ScadMill's newly embedded Apache-2.0 DMG license.

externalInputs.purpose: Inspect the exact-head Ubuntu M4 hosted failure at the Current file context toggle.
Inspect the exact-head macOS DMG lifecycle failure after the embedded Apache license was presented.

decisions.decision: Capture each checkbox's checked value synchronously in its change handler before passing that primitive into the functional React state update.
decisions.rationale: The hosted Linux click completed while the controlled checkbox remained checked. Reading event.currentTarget later inside the state-updater callback ties the update to transient event state; capturing the boolean at handler entry makes the controlled state deterministic across scheduler timing.

decisions.decision: Pass -acceptlicense on the single read-only hdiutil attach command used by the hosted macOS lifecycle proof.
decisions.rationale: The Apache-2.0 bundle license was correctly embedded and presented, after which hdiutil canceled because the CI probe is noninteractive. Explicitly accepting that exact embedded license preserves the existing read-only mount and fail-closed behavior for all other attach errors.

testEvidence.criterion: AI context toggles must settle to the user's selected controlled state before the next request is assembled.
testEvidence.test: Use the exact hosted M4 failure as RED, add a focused component request-context regression, capture event booleans synchronously, and run the focused component file once.

red.outcome: RED: Playwright timed out after 30 seconds at m4-hosted-journey.e2e.ts:316. The Current file checkbox click completed but its controlled checked state never settled false.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/scripts/windows-installer.test.ts --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
green.outcome: GREEN locally: 2 files and all 21 tests passed in 2.74 seconds. The component regression proves all three default-on context toggles stay off across a source rerender and omit every context tag from the next provider request. Exact hosted Linux confirmation remains required.

testEvidence.criterion: The license-bearing DMG must mount noninteractively for the existing read-only lifecycle proof without a second unguarded attach path.
testEvidence.test: Add an exact workflow contract first, observe it fail against the bare attach command, then add -acceptlicense and rerun the same focused lane once.

red.command: macOS Desktop installer job 88249025006; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/scripts/windows-installer.test.ts --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
red.outcome: RED hosted: hdiutil printed the complete embedded Apache License and then reported attach canceled. RED locally: 1 of 21 focused tests failed because the workflow lacked -acceptlicense; the 20 component tests passed.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/scripts/windows-installer.test.ts --reporter=dot --maxWorkers=1
green.outcome: GREEN locally: 2 files and all 21 tests passed in 2.74 seconds. The parsed workflow contract requires exactly one hdiutil attach path and requires it to accept the embedded license while preserving read-only mounting. Exact hosted macOS confirmation remains required.

nearMisses.confirmation: Rejected. The failed controlled checkbox could ignore a user's source-context opt-out and send source to the configured provider. The production event-lifetime defect was fixed for all four context toggles, and the regression crosses a source rerender before inspecting the real outbound request.

questions: Q-0038 is resolved. Q-0039 remains open.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
